Text: Ja Morant would be a top-3 player in the league if he could stay healthy and stay focused. The talent is there.
The ref situation in this league is completely out of control. It's been rigged against small-market teams for two decades.
This is not the time for cool heads. This team just broke my heart AGAIN.

Offensively the Pacers rank 4th in pace and 7th in points in the paint this season. Their transition offense generates 18.3 PPG which is 2nd in the league. This is a system built around speed not star power.

The Nuggets' three-peat probability based on historical models: 22%. Every team that has won back-to-back since 2005 has faced roster attrition via salary cap. Denver has three players entering extension years simultaneously.
